register.title: Sign Up
register.password_hint: Include at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, digits, symbols
register.success_body: A verification link has been sent to your email address. Please click the link to complete the verification.
register.have_account: Already have an account? Log in
register.unavailable_banner_body: This feature is temporarily disabled while the system is being prepared. If you wish to use ShuttleScope, please contact us via the official inquiry form. We will respond in due course.

password_reset_request.title: Password Reset
password_reset_request.description: Enter your registered email address. We will send you a reset link.
password_reset_request.sent_message: Request received. If the address is registered, an email will arrive (valid for 15 minutes).

invitation.title: Accept Invitation
invitation.invalid: Invitation token is invalid or expired

password_change.title: Change password
password_change.hint: Enter your current and new password. Sessions on other devices will be signed out automatically after the change.
password_change.requirements: Use at least 12 characters including at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, digits, symbols

admin_reset.title: Force password reset
admin_reset.hint: Replaces the selected user's password with a temporary one. After reset, deliver the new password securely.

audit_log.title: Audit log
audit_log.hint: Shows authentication and account operation history (admin only).

condition.title: Condition

history_detail.title: Response details
history_detail.edit_hint: Analysts can edit each response to re-score

tags.title: Period tags
tags.description: Register periods such as training camps, pre-tournament or stressful phases, and compare condition differences inside vs outside those periods.
tags.label: Label
tags.label_placeholder: e.g. Training camp / Pre-tournament / Stress phase
tags.error_required: Label and start date are required
tags.error_end_before_start: End date must be on or after the start date
tags.compare_description: Displays the difference (in − out) between the average within the selected tag period and outside it. Metrics with too few samples are skipped.
tags.insufficient_sample: Not enough samples inside or outside the period to display a difference.
tags.sample_note: A reliable comparison needs at least 2 measurements inside and outside the period. Check the N values.

condition.player_notice: This condition data is only visible to you
condition.range_error_hooper: Hooper items must be between 1 and 7

weekly.title: Condition log (weekly)
weekly.intro: Think back over the last 3 days and answer honestly (about 5-8 minutes)

prematch.title: Pre-match check
prematch.intro: Answer just before the match (about 1 minute)

result.personal_range_note: Evaluated against your own past 28 days
result.positive_comment: Keep the current pace and listen to your body as you train

q.F1-01: I felt strong fatigue after practice or matches
q.F1-02: I had lingering heaviness or dullness in my muscles
q.F1-03: The previous day's fatigue hadn't cleared by morning
q.F1-04: My stamina recovered as usual after exercise
q.F1-05: My overall condition felt well balanced
q.F1-06: I got out of breath more easily than usual
q.F1-07: I felt tightness or heaviness in my legs
q.F1-08: My heart rate rose more easily for the same workload
q.F2-01: I woke up during the night
q.F2-02: It took a long time to fall asleep after getting into bed
q.F2-03: I got the sleep I needed
q.F2-04: I woke up feeling refreshed in the morning
q.F2-05: I felt strong drowsiness during the day
q.F2-06: I was able to rest properly on off-days
q.F2-07: Overall I was satisfied with my sleep quality
q.F2-08: I was able to relax body and mind before bed
q.F3-01: My mood felt low at times
q.F3-02: I got irritated over small things
q.F3-03: I felt a vague, unexplained anxiety
q.F3-04: I was able to spend my days in a positive frame of mind
q.F3-05: I found it bothersome to deal with people
q.F3-06: My mood was swayed by worries outside of sport
q.F3-07: I spent my days in a calm state of mind
q.F3-08: I got rattled by minor things
q.F4-02: Thinking about my goals got me excited
q.F4-03: I stayed focused right through practice
q.F4-04: I could vividly imagine how a match would unfold
q.F4-05: I felt a strong desire to improve further
q.F4-07: I felt a sense of achievement in my play
q.F4-08: I worked tenaciously even when things went poorly
q.F5-01: I could move my body exactly as I intended
q.F5-04: My reactions to the opponent's shots were in time
q.F5-05: My core was stable when hitting
q.F5-06: My timing and distance in matches felt right
q.F5-08: I had enough energy to keep moving through to the end
q.V-01: I read each question carefully before answering
q.V-02: I answered honestly based on my own experience
q.V-03: I thought back on myself over the last few days while answering
q.V-04: For this item, please choose "Strongly agree" regardless of content
q.P-01: Right now my body feels light
q.P-02: My body is warmed up from the warm-up
q.P-03: I'm in a state where I can focus on the match
q.P-04: My mindset is set for the match
q.P-05: I can picture how I want to play today's match
q.P-06: I don't feel excessive tension or anxiety
q.P-07: I have no concerning pain or discomfort
q.P-08: I got enough sleep last night
q.P-09: I ate and hydrated as planned
q.P-10: I can step onto the court with confidence

volatility.title: Coefficient of variation ranking
volatility.description: Compares each metric's CV (SD/Mean) and weekly-diff SD to surface the most volatile metrics (N<5 excluded)
volatility.legend_diff: Orange = weekly-diff SD (sample SD of 1st differences, magnitude of swing)

lag_corr.title: Lag correlation (Lead/Lag)
lag_corr.description: Correlation between X(t) and Y(t+k). Positive k means Y lags X.

post_match.title: Condition change around matches
post_match.description: Compares the 7-day average before and after each match day. Positive = improvement, negative = decline.
post_match.hint_select: Select a match to see the condition change around it

pca.title: Principal component analysis (PCA 2D)
pca.description: Standardizes numeric metrics and plots the top two principal components. Color = month (1-12).
pca.no_data: Not enough samples (need ≥10 valid rows and ≥3 columns)

generic_scatter.title: Generic scatter (free X / Y / color)
generic_scatter.intro: Pick any two metrics and a color dimension from your recorded condition data to explore trends. Correlations at small N are indicative only.

corr_heatmap.title: Factor correlation heatmap
corr_heatmap.note_no_factors: Note: the list API doesn't return f1-f5 / ccs, so this table is limited to raw data such as Hooper/RPE/Sleep/InBody.
corr_heatmap.insufficient: Fewer than two columns have the ≥5 records needed to compute correlations
corr_heatmap.insufficient_pair: This pair has too few samples

best_profile.title_player: Traits when you play your best
best_profile.player_intro: You tend to play well when your condition matches the following
best_profile.player_note: These are tendencies only. Keep focusing on your daily effort.
best_profile.win_rate_improvement: Moving closer to best state projects +{{diff}}% win rate

type.inbody_mental_mismatch: Body data vs mental response mismatch
type.sleep_mismatch: Sleep hours vs subjective response mismatch

outlier.title: Outlier-week detection
outlier.description: Flags weeks whose Z-score deviates from the past 28-day baseline
outlier.insufficient: Not enough history for comparison yet (valid samples < 5)
outlier.detail_title: All metrics' Z-scores for the week

seasonality.title: Seasonality / weekday effects
seasonality.description: Compares average metrics by month, quarter, and weekday
seasonality.min_n_note: Each cell shows N. When N<{{n}}, — is displayed.

insights.accumulating: Insights will appear once a bit more data accumulates

when.sleep_long: Weeks with high sleep / lifestyle score
when.hooper_low: Weeks with low fatigue index (well-rested weeks)

growth_card.low_confidence_hidden: Cards with N<10 are hidden (only ★★☆ and above shown)
growth_card.mechanism: Aggregates match results within 3 days after weeks where this metric is above (or below) normal, and compares them with normal weeks. This is a tendency, not a causal link.

trend.title: Time-series trends
trend.factors_note: Weekly score trend for each factor
trend.aux_note: Weight, muscle mass, body fat % (where recorded)
trend.player_growth_note: Use CCS and its 28-day moving average to reflect on your daily work

exception.title: Early finish
exception.subtitle: Data recorded so far will still be used in analysis
exception.mid_rally_warning: The rally currently being entered will be discarded

player.name: Name
player.search_placeholder: Filter by name, team or nationality

quick_start.title: Live analysis
quick_start.error: Failed to start the match. Please try again.
quick_start.analyst_side_label: Home player's position at start of Set 1

input_step.idle: Press Space to start a rally
input_step.complete: Press Enter to confirm the stroke

ui.camera_start_hint: Start the camera from device manager
ui.video_set_hint: Open a file below or set a URL

error_boundary.title: ⚠ A display error occurred
error_boundary.footer_hint: Please "Copy error details" and send it to the developer.

video.youtube_warning: Frame-stepping is not available on YouTube videos

cog.title: Center-of-gravity balance
cog.axis_hint: Y axis: left-weighted ratio (top = left-leaning / bottom = right-leaning)

analysis.restricted: This content is for analysts and coaches

review.title: Review
review.effective_map_subtitle: Landing points of shots that led to points
review.next_action_placeholder: Recommended actions from analysis (entered by the analyst)
review.guide_step1: 1. Check the receiver's growth points and effective distribution
review.guide_step3: 3. Use set-level performance to pinpoint change points
review.guide_step4: 4. Dig into repeated patterns with the rally sequence

opponent_type_affinity.title: Affinity by opponent type
opponent_type_affinity.subtitle: Win rate vs attacking / defensive / balanced styles

skip_rally.title: Select the scorer
skip_rally.hint: Record a point with no strokes
skip_rally.score_correction_hint: Use when several rallies were missed to realign to the actual score
skip_rally.force_set_end_hint: Enter the actual final score to end the set

tracknet.title: TrackNet auto-analysis
tracknet.disabled_hint: When enabled, landing points are auto-filled by AI
tracknet.enable_description: When enabled, landing points are auto-filled by AI
tracknet.mode_description: Batch processes after the match; Assist infers in real time

yolo.title: YOLO player detection
yolo.enable_description: When enabled, player positions are auto-detected by AI (assisted/research use)
yolo.model_not_found: Not installed — run pip install ultralytics

panel.no_strokes: This rally has no stroke candidates

sharing.lan_mode_description: Allow coaches and bench staff on the same network to access via their browsers (takes effect next launch)
sharing.lan_access_hint: Have coaches open this URL in their browser
sharing.lan_disabled_hint: When enabled, coaches can access from the same LAN
sharing.lan_no_ip: Could not obtain a LAN IP
sharing.guide_step1: Enable "LAN share mode" and restart the backend
sharing.guide_step2: Create a session from the "Share" button in the AnnotatorPage header
sharing.guide_step3: Open the displayed URL on the coach / bench phone or PC
sharing.guide_step4: When the analyst saves a rally, the coach screen updates in real time
sharing.diag_not_run: Press "Run diagnostics" to diagnose your network
sharing.lan_app_url_hint: Opening this URL on a phone/tablet gives access to the full app
sharing.tunnel_description: Generates a public URL that can be accessed from anywhere via cloudflared
sharing.tunnel_url_hint: This URL is reachable over the internet
sharing.tunnel_not_available: Neither ngrok nor cloudflared was found
sharing.remote_exposure_description: Generates a public URL reachable over the internet. Auto selects ngrok, then Cloudflare.
sharing.auto_order_hint: Automatically selects an available option in the order ngrok → Cloudflare
sharing.remote_video_description: Send / receive camera video from iOS Safari or a PC browser. No app install required.
sharing.turn_description: Relays video when direct P2P fails on enterprise networks or mobile carriers
sharing.webrtc_best_effort_warning: Without TURN: best-effort connection. May fail on corporate or mobile networks.
sharing.turn_url_invalid: TURN URL format is invalid (e.g. turn:your-server.example.com:3478)
sharing.turn_when_required: When TURN is needed: corporate networks, VPNs, mobile carriers — any environment where direct P2P doesn't work
sharing.ngrok_authtoken_hint: ngrok 3.x requires an auth token. Get one at https://dashboard.ngrok.com/get-started/your-authtoken.

warmup.title: Pre-match warm-up observations
warmup.subtitle: Record observations and confidence (use "Tentative" for uncertain items)
warmup.locked_hint: Warm-up notes cannot be changed after Set 1 starts

prediction.title: Match prediction
prediction.subtitle: Statistical prediction based on past match data
prediction.role_coach_hint: Coach view: shows only win rate and most-likely result
prediction.script_no_rally_data: Match script details not computed due to missing rally data

observation_analytics.title: Auxiliary observation insights
observation_analytics.subtitle: Reference tendencies based on pre-match observations (may include small samples and subjective data)

annotation_mode.label: Mode:
annotation_mode.detailed_title: Assisted (designed around input assist and later fill-in)
annotation_mode.basic_helper: The current fast-input mode. Use this when reliable recording is the priority.
annotation_mode.detailed_helper: Record with input assist — uses candidate suggestions and later fill-in.
annotation_mode.saveable_hint: You can save with just shot input → rally end
annotation_mode.enrichment_hint: For detailed analysis; optional (can be filled in later)

review_later.hint: Flags the last rally for later review

lan_session.one_camera_only: Only one camera can be active
lan_session.share_modal_password_note: Joining devices need both the session code and password
lan_session.share_modal_camera_qr_hint: Scan the QR on iPhone to join without a password
lan_session.share_modal_viewer_qr_hint: Scan the QR on a PC or tablet to receive video

camera_sender.state_a_title: Waiting for start command from the PC
camera_sender.state_a_hint: This device is registered as a camera candidate
camera_sender.state_b_title: Use this device as the camera?
camera_sender.auth_required: Session code and password are required

viewer_relay.tablet_hint: Full video viewing is available on tablet/PC. Smartphones show summary view only.

handoff.confirm_body: There is a camera currently active. Switch?
handoff.local_switch_confirm: Switch to the local camera. Stop the remote camera?

expert_labeler.title: Expert annotation
expert_labeler.subtitle: Coach / analyst only
expert_labeler.empty_desc: Matches satisfying all of the following appear here:
expert_labeler.empty_cond_1: The match is registered and not deleted (add from the Matches page)
expert_labeler.empty_cond_2: A video file (video_local_path) is linked to the match
expert_labeler.empty_cond_3: Rallies are recorded and at least one has end_type "unforced_error" or "forced_error" (for miss labeling)
expert_labeler.empty_cond_4: The annotator's role is analyst or coach (current role: {{role}})
expert_labeler.empty_hint: Matches with 0 misses still appear in the list, but clip / label targets are only rallies with miss-type end_type.
expert_labeler.role_restricted: This feature is for coaches and analysts only
expert_labeler.shortcut_hint: Shortcuts: ←→ prev/next / K play-pause / 1-3 confidence / S skip / Enter save
expert_labeler.shot_type_admin_only: This feature is available to admins only
expert_labeler.shot_type_hint: Annotated shot types will be used as AI model training data (Terms of Use, Section 9)

cog_detection.title: CoG Deviation Detection
cog_detection.subtitle: Visualise player weight transfer and CoG stability
cog_detection.no_data: No CoG data for this stroke
cog_detection.sample_warning: Small sample — treat as indicative only

ui.no_players: No players registered. Use the "Add player" button to add one.
ui.no_match_players: No players match the current filter.
ui.name: Name
ui.audit_logs_desc: Review the history of logins, user management actions, and data changes (admin only).
ui.theme_hint: Toggle between light and dark mode
ui.language_hint: Switches the UI language. Untranslated items remain in Japanese.

doubles_analysis.no_match_selected: Select a doubles match to see coverage

court_heat_modal.title: Court heatmap
court_heat_modal.composite_note: Landing points are point-symmetrically mapped around the net and overlaid on the home-court coordinates. Click a tile for hit- and landing-point details.
court_heat_modal.no_data: No stroke data for the period
court_heat_modal.no_data_hint: Heatmap appears once match annotation is completed
court_heat_modal.click_zone_detail:
Click a zone on the court diagram
to see detailed analysis
court_heat_modal.section_transitions: Where shots from this zone land

manage.title: User management
manage.self_only_hint: You can edit your own profile
manage.coach_hint: You can view and edit team members only
manage.no_permission: You do not have permission to manage users
manage.search_placeholder: Search by display name, login ID or player name
manage.credential_hint_player_new: Players can also set a regular password
manage.validate_team_name: Select a team or enter a team name (required for non-admin roles)
manage.reset_confirm: Reset {{name}}'s password to a temporary value?

CounterfactualShots.k2: Compares which return is most effective in each situation

OpponentPolicyCard.k8: High entropy = diverse shot selection (hard to predict). Low entropy = concentrated on specific shots (predictable).
OpponentPolicyCard.k9: Predictable ▶ easier to narrow return patterns. Unpredictable ▶ watch for varied placement.

PlayerMovementCard.k3: Click here to open the grid and synchronize.
PlayerMovementCard.k4: Click here to configure the grid.

PredictionPanel.k1: Select an opponent team to see the prediction
PredictionPanel.k2: Choose an opponent from the header "Opponent" selector

ScoreProgression.k3: No stroke data has been recorded

StateActionValueCard.k7: Q = win rate of the best shot within the state minus the state's baseline. Wide CIs indicate weak statistical support.

StateEPVCard.k3: Not enough data (each state needs at least 10 rallies)
StateEPVCard.k9: Only states with confidence ≥ 50% are shown. Interpret rows with wide CIs cautiously.

YoloCVPositionCard.k2: No match data for the selected period.
YoloCVPositionCard.k8: Share of time the receiver (player_b) was in the front court. n is sample size.

ClusterSettingsPanel.k5: Wake-on-LAN: requires WOL enabled in BIOS
ClusterSettingsPanel.k7: Run ray-restart.bat over SSH (requires ssh_user / ssh_password / ray_restart_bat in cluster.config.yaml)

RolePicker.k1: Which player are you logging in as?
RolePicker.k2: Only matches you participated in will be shown
RolePicker.k5: Only matches of players in that team will be shown
RolePicker.k8: Search by team name / type a team

DeviceManagerPanel.k13: Affects only this PC — tablets etc. are not affected

CourtGridOverlay.k2: Click the 4 corners and 2 net-post points to configure
CourtGridOverlay.k3: Saved locally only (not synced to backend). Click to sync to DB

StreamingDownloadPanel.k6: Cookies are read directly from disk.
StreamingDownloadPanel.k7: No browser launch required. Just sign in to the site in that browser beforehand.
StreamingDownloadPanel.k8: Note: close that browser completely before downloading. While it's running the DB is locked and cookies can't be read (especially Edge / Chrome).
StreamingDownloadPanel.k10: Quality limited because ffmpeg is not installed

AnnotatorPage.k4: Skip already-analyzed rallies and resume from where you left off
AnnotatorPage.k5: Save the current frame and stop (resumable)
AnnotatorPage.k6: Skip existing frames and resume from where you left off
AnnotatorPage.k7: Delete existing person-detection results and reset
AnnotatorPage.k8: Run additional detection only on expanded ROI and merge
AnnotatorPage.k16: Apply only high-confidence (auto_filled) landing zone and hitter
AnnotatorPage.k22: Remote connection status (click to open device manager)
AnnotatorPage.k23: For DRM-protected content (when yt-dlp can't download)

DashboardLivePage.k3: Select a match to see the interval report

DashboardOverviewPage.k8: * This content is for analysts and coaches
DashboardOverviewPage.k13: Select a match to see score progression
DashboardOverviewPage.k14: Select a match to see the interval report
DashboardOverviewPage.k15: An error occurred while rendering the chart
DashboardOverviewPage.k17: An error occurred while rendering the heatmap

DashboardReviewPage.k1: Select a match to see score progression
DashboardReviewPage.k2: Select a match to use rally video jump

MatchListPage.k4: Browser to take cookies from for login-required sites
MatchListPage.k13: Search by tournament, player, venue or notes...

NotificationInboxPage.k1: Notification review is for the admin role only.
NotificationInboxPage.k3: Review inquiries received from the public site.
NotificationInboxPage.k10: Please select a notification from the left.
NotificationInboxPage.k11: Track status and leave notes here

PredictionPage.k7: Search by date or tournament level...

SettingsPage.k1: # or all at once: python -m backend.tracknet.setup all
SettingsPage.k7: Fetching URL... (may take a few seconds)
SettingsPage.k9: Unique identifier per PC. Records which machine a package came from.
SettingsPage.k10: Sync folder path (OneDrive / SharePoint / Google Drive, etc.)

SettingsPage.k13: Export all data updated on or after this date/time
